heading: “Coffee” defined
label: 1356l “Coffee” defined
text: As used in this section and , the term “coffee” means coffee as defined in article 3 of the International Coffee Agreement, 1983.section 1356k of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the International Coffee Agreement Act of 1980, and not as part of the Tariff Act of 1930 which comprises this chapter.
